basic_details.job_title: NTPC Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 25 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: NTPC Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise)
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Engineer Contracts & Materials Recruitment 2026: Get the latest NTPC Limited recruitment notification 2026 for 25 Engineer (Contracts & Materials) vacancies under NTPC Limited, A Govt. of India Enterprise. The online application process starts on 11th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 25th May 2026. Find NTPC vacancies on the official website careers.ntpc.co.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming NTPC Engineer Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitme

application_fee.details: Candidates belonging to the General/EWS/OBC category are required to pay a non-refundable application fee of Rs. 500/-. SC/ST/PwBD category and female candidates need not pay the application fee. Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates are therefore requested to verify their eligibility criteria before paying the application fee. | Payment in Offline Mode: State Bank of India (SBI) has been authorized to collect the application fee in a specially opened account (A/C No. 30987919993) at CAG branch, New Delhi (Code: 09996), on behalf of NTPC. Candidates must approach the nearby SBI branch with a printout of the "pay-in-slip" available on the application portal. | Payment in Online Mode: Candidates may also pay the fee online through Net Banking / Debit Card / Credit Card. The online payment option will be available in the online application form.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit for the post is 32 years as on the last date of receipt of online applications. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as specified below. In no case shall the age exceed the relaxed limit applicable to the respective category. Age relaxation of 10 years for PwBD candidates is in addition to SC/ST/OBC relaxation, wherever applicable.

qualification.required_degree: B.E. / B.Tech Degree in Electrical / Electrical & Electronics / Electronics / Mechanical / Production / Electronics & Control & Instrumentation / Instrumentation / Civil with at least 60% marks from a recognized University/Institution.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of receipt of online applications (25-05-2026). Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications should be full-time from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. SC/ST/PwBD candidates with passing marks in the qualifying degree are also eligible to apply. | All computations of age, experience requirement, and qualification will be done with reference to the last date of receipt of online applications. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of other category will be admissible later. | Educational Qualification | Experience Requirement

selection_process: Stage 1 Application Shortlisting / Screening (based on qualification/percentage of marks, no. of years of post-qualification experience, etc.)
Stage 4 (Post-selection) Medical Examination by NTPC Medical Board/Officer (decision is final and binding)
The selection process for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitment 2026 may comprise of multiple stages at the management's discretion. Depending on the requirement

the management reserves the right to conduct a multi-stage selection process. Merely fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria does not bestow on the candidate the right to be shortlisted/called for written test/interview or to be considered for the selection process.

Note: The above stages may be used in combination or independently as per requirement. Posting shall be at any of the Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC. All posts are transferable at the sole discretion of the Management.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the NTPC careers portal at https://careers.ntpc.co.in or through the careers section at www.ntpc.co.in. No other means/mode of application shall be accepted. Candidates are required to possess a valid email ID. NTPC will not be responsible for bouncing back any email sent to the candidates. After applying online, the candidate is required to download the application slip generated by the system with a unique application number. No document is required to be sent to NTPC by post.

Candidates should ensure that all documents are uploaded completely while applying — applications with incomplete/insufficient documents are liable to be rejected/not considered for further process. The applicant should ensure he/she fulfills the eligibility and other norms mentioned above, as on the specified dates, and that the particulars furnished are correct in all respects.
Documents to be Scanned and Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Class X passing certificate/Marksheet, PAN Card, and Aadhaar Card (for Name and DOB proof)
Consolidated Marksheet/Transcript/all semester marksheets clearly indicating aggregate % of marks in all semesters
Marks conversion formula from the University/Institute for conversion of marks in CGPA/CGPI/DGPA/CGI/CPI etc. into percentage (%)
Caste/Disability certificate as applicable (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/PwBD/EWS candidates)
OBC-NCL certificate in central format for current financial year (FY 2026-27)
EWS candidates: current year Income & Asset certificate valid for FY 2026-27 based on income of FY 2025-26
Disability certificate in latest prescribed central Govt. format generated online through Swavalamban/UDID portal (clearly indicating type and percentage of disability)

All experience-related documents for each organization/company in chronological order — including Experience/Service certificate (as per NTPC prescribed sample format), Offer of Appointment/Appointment letter/Offer Letter + Confirmation/Absorption Letter/Order on completion of training, Joining Order/Letter, Role Assignment orders, Promotion orders, Transfer orders, Organization charts, 02 pay slips per every year for each organization, etc.
Form 16 of current/previous employer for last 03 financial years (for candidates working in private sector)
NOC (No Objection Certificate) from current employer (for candidates working in Govt./Public Sector Undertakings)
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications should be full-time from Universities/Institutions recognized and approved in India. The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed. Candidates must have the applicable year's valid EWS/OBC/SC/ST/Disability certificate from the Competent Authority in the latest prescribed format of Govt. of India. Applications with incomplete/insufficient documents are liable to be rejected/not considered for further process. No other mode of application other than Online will be accepted. No documents need to be sent by post. Fees once paid will not be refunded. Verify eligibility before making payment. Candidates currently working in Govt./Public Sector Undertakings must submit NOC from the current employer. Candidates working in the private sector must submit Form 16 of current/previous employer for the last 03 financial years. The management reserves the right to cancel/restrict/curtail/increase the number of vacancies, if need arises, without further notice and without assigning any reason. Posting shall be at any of the Stations/Projects/JVs/Subsidiaries of NTPC. All posts are transferable at the sole discretion of Management. Canvassing in any form shall disqualify the candidate. Any proceedings in respect of any matter of claim or dispute can be instituted only in Delhi. Courts/Tribunals/Forums at Delhi only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction. In case of any ambiguity/dispute arising on account of interpretation in versions other than English, the English version will prevail. All decisions of NTPC management regarding eligibility, selection, and other matters are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive by NTPC Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise) for 25 Engineer (Contracts & Materials) posts in E2/IDA grade under Advertisement No. 06B/26.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) 2026?
faq.answer: NTPC has announced a total of 25 vacancies for Engineer (Contracts & Materials), distributed as 13 UR, 2 EWS, 6 OBC, 3 SC and 1 ST post, with reservation for PwBD candidates as per Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for NTPC Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitment 2026 starts on 11 May 2026 and the last date for online application submission is 25 May 2026, as per the schedule mentioned on the NTPC careers portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a full‑time B.E./B.Tech degree in Electrical, Electrical & Electronics, Electronics, Mechanical, Production, Electronics & Control & Instrumentation, Instrumentation or Civil with at least 60% marks from a recognized University/Institute; SC/ST/PwBD candidates with passing marks are eligible as per NTPC norms.

faq.question: Q5. What experience is required for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must have a minimum of 4 years post‑qualification executive experience (including training, if any) in the Power/Oil/Gas/Steel sector, with at least 2 years’ experience in Contract, Purchase, Stores, Procurement or a combination of these domains.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for the NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) post is 32 years as on the last date of online application, with age relaxation for OBC (3 years), SC/ST (5 years) and PwBD candidates (10 years in addition to category relaxation) as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary or pay scale for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed in E2/IDA pay scale of Rs. 50,000 – 1,60,000 with applicable Dearness Allowance and other benefits/perks as admissible under NTPC’s rules for executives.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for NTPC Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General, EWS and OBC male candidates must pay a non‑refundable application fee of Rs. 500, while SC, ST, PwBD and all female candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for NTPC Engineer (Contracts & Materials) Recruitment 2026.
